seeed_gfx_init.tooltip: Initialize the screen using the selected SPI frequency, the default is 50 MHz; MAX is CPU/2, for testing only, may cause screen distortion

seeed_gfx_fill_screen.tooltip: Fill the entire screen with the specified color

options: Swap XY axes and mirror horizontally

seeed_gfx_draw_pixel.message0: Draw points on the screen %1 X:%2 Y: %3 Color: %4
seeed_gfx_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw a point at specified coordinates

seeed_gfx_draw_line.message0: On the screen %1 draw lines from X:%2 Y:%3 to X:%4 Y:%5 Color:%6
seeed_gfx_draw_line.tooltip: draw a line between two points

seeed_gfx_draw_rect.message0: On the screen %1, draw a rectangle X:%2 Y:%3 width:%4 height:%5 color:%6

seeed_gfx_fill_rect.message0: On the screen %1, fill rectangles X:%2 Y:%3 Width:%4 Height:%5 Color:%6

seeed_gfx_fill_rect_v_gradient.message0: On the screen %1, vertical gradient fills rectangles X:%2 Y:%3 Width:%4 Height:%5 Starting color: %6 End color: %7
seeed_gfx_fill_rect_v_gradient.tooltip: Fill a rectangular area with a vertical gradient

seeed_gfx_fill_rect_h_gradient.message0: On the screen %1 Horizontal gradient fills rectangles X:%2 Y:%3 Width:%4 Height:%5 Starting color:%6 End color:%7
seeed_gfx_fill_rect_h_gradient.tooltip: Fill a rectangular area with a horizontal gradient

seeed_gfx_draw_round_rect.message0: On the screen %1, draw rounded rectangles X:%2 Y:%3 Width:%4 Height:%5 Fillet radius:%6 Color:%7

seeed_gfx_fill_round_rect.message0: On the screen %1 fill the fillet rectangle X:%2 Y:%3 Width:%4 Height:%5 Fillet radius:%6 Color:%7

seeed_gfx_draw_circle.message0: On the screen %1, draw a circle, center X:%2, Y:%3, radius:%4, color:%5

seeed_gfx_fill_circle.message0: On the screen %1 Fill circle Center X:%2 Y:%3 Radius:%4 Color:%5

seeed_gfx_draw_triangle.message0: Draw a triangle on the screen %1 Point 1X: %2 Y: %3 Point 2X: %4 Y: %5 Point 3X: %6 Y:%7 Color:%8

seeed_gfx_fill_triangle.message0: Filled triangle in screen %1 Point 1X: %2 Y: %3 Point 2X: %4 Y: %5 Point 3X: %6 Y:%7 Color:%8

seeed_gfx_draw_ellipse.message0: On the screen %1 draw an ellipse, center X:%2 Y:%3 radius X:%4 radius Y:%5 Color:%6

seeed_gfx_fill_ellipse.message0: On the screen %1 fill the ellipse Center X:%2 Y:%3 Radius X:%4 Radius Y:%5 Color:%6

seeed_gfx_set_text_color.message0: Settings screen %1 Text color %2 Background color %3
seeed_gfx_set_text_color.tooltip: Set text color and background color

seeed_gfx_set_cursor.message0: Settings screen %1 Cursor position X:%2 Y:%3

seeed_gfx_draw_string.message0: On the screen, %1 displays text %2 X:%3 Y:%4 font:%5

seeed_gfx_animation.tooltip: Upload GIF or MP4 and convert to Seeed GFX RGB565/RGB332 animation frames

seeed_gfx_play_animation.message0: Screen %1 Play animation Coordinates X:%2 Y:%3 Animation %4 Mode %5
seeed_gfx_play_animation.tooltip: Play a Seeed GFX animation; non-blocking mode displays the next frame each time the loop reaches the frame interval

seeed_gfx_play_sd_video.message0: Screen %1 Play SD card mode video file %2 Cache %3 KB
seeed_gfx_play_sd_video.tooltip: Play the AILY modulo video in the SD card; RGB565 uses double buffering DMA when memory allows. Please use Seeed FS to initialize the SD card before playing.

seeed_gfx_draw_animation_frame.message0: Screen %1 displays animation frames Coordinates X:%2 Y:%3 Animation %4 Frame%5
seeed_gfx_draw_animation_frame.tooltip: Displays the specified Seeed GFX animation frame. Frame numbers outside the range will be limited to the valid range.

seeed_gfx_animation_frame_count.tooltip: Get the total number of frames of Seeed GFX animation

seeed_gfx_step_animation_frame.message0: Let the frame variable %1 move one step towards the target frame %2 with the total number of frames %3 in the direction %4
seeed_gfx_step_animation_frame.tooltip: Move the frame variable one step toward the target frame, automatically select the direction or force a forward or reverse cycle
